tasks.title: Repeat-offender demotion: per-incident recurrence over 30d, known-transient exclusion, analysis-only demote with auto-expiry

scenarios: A genuine repeat-offender tuple is auto-demoted to analysis-only
A tuple recurring three times in thirty days is classified a demote candidate
A tuple recurring twice is not classified a demote candidate
An intentional known-transient tuple is excluded from demotion
A demotion auto-expires after thirty days

tasks.title: Judge-liveness monitor: per-tenant judged fraction from judge-independent tables + judge-death warning

scenarios: The judge-liveness monitor computes the judged fraction from judge-independent tables
A non-recent session is excluded from the judged fraction
A judged fraction below one half over more than three sessions raises a judge-death warning
A judged fraction below one half with three or fewer eligible sessions raises no warning

tasks.title: Governance Temporal Schedules + retention split: demotion decisions and liveness facts on the immutable audit spine, transcripts purgeable

scenarios: A governance demotion decision is appended to the immutable audit spine
A raw judged transcript is purgeable while the judged fraction fact is retained
